examples: Tonality is, in general, the same as key.
A piece of music or a passage may be in a particular key or tonality.
There is no body language or voice tonality to convey nuances and emotions.
Just as happily, debates over the death of tonality and other churlish ideological battles have subsided.
Texting, surely a gaming offshoot in many ways, has changed the tonality of writing and even talking.
